events.title: Paul McCartney turns 84
events.blurb: Sir Paul McCartney, legendary co-founder of The Beatles, celebrates his 84th birthday.

angles.name: Macca's Legacy
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to the one and only Sir Paul McCartney! What's your favourite Beatles or Wings track, and why?

events.title: Alison Moyet turns 65
events.blurb: English singer-songwriter Alison Moyet, known for her powerful voice and work with Yazoo, celebrates her 65th birthday.

angles.name: Moyet's Voice
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 65th birthday to the incredible Alison Moyet! That voice is just unmistakable. Which of her tracks is essential listening today?

events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: Grammy-winning American singer-songwriter Lionel Richie, famous for his solo hits and work with The Commodores, celebrates his 77th birthday.

angles.name: Hello Lionel
angles.copy: Hello! Is it Lionel Richie's 77th birthday we're looking for? Absolutely! What's your go-to track from the legend?

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: The iconic American singer, songwriter, and actress Cyndi Lauper celebrates her 73rd birthday.

angles.name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the one and only Cyndi Lauper! Still rocking those vibrant colours and incredible vocals. What's your favourite Cyndi hit?

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering the incredible George Michael, who would have celebrated his 63rd birthday today.

angles.name: George Michael's Music
angles.copy: Forever missed, never forgotten. Today would have been George Michael's 63rd birthday. His music lives on. What's your favourite track from the legend?

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the death of the 'King of Pop', Michael Jackson.

angles.name: Remembering the King
angles.copy: 17 years today since we lost the King of Pop, Michael Jackson. His music continues to inspire generations. What's your all-time favourite MJ track?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Sir Ringo Starr, drummer for The Beatles, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Peace & Love from Ringo
angles.copy: Happy 86th Birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr! Sending him all the Peace & Love today. What's your favourite Ringo moment, with or without The Beatles?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: A very happy 79th birthday to the incredible Sir Brian May! Guitar legend, astrophysicist, and rock icon. What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Jagger's Moves
angles.copy: Still got the moves like Jagger at 83! Happy Birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Rolling Stones track?

events.title: 45 years since MTV launched
events.blurb: MTV launched 45 years ago today, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago, MTV launched with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did video really kill the radio star? We're still here! What was your favourite MTV memory?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Impact
angles.copy: It's 1994 all over again! Celebrating the anniversary of Oasis's iconic debut album, 'Definitely Maybe'. What's your standout track?

events.title: 57 years since Woodstock
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Festival of Music & Art took place 57 years ago, a pivotal moment in music history.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since the fields of Woodstock came alive with '3 Days of Peace & Music'. What's your favourite performance or memory from the iconic festival?

events.title: 49 years since Elvis' passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the death of the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: 49 years today since we said goodbye to Elvis Presley. His music still reigns supreme. What's your favourite Elvis track that still makes you swoon?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Remembering the influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who was shot dead in Las Vegas on this day.

angles.name: Tupac's Impact
angles.copy: On this day, we remember Tupac Shakur. His impact on music and culture remains profound. What's a Tupac lyric that resonates with you?

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the death of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix.

angles.name: Guitar God Forever
angles.copy: 56 years ago, the world lost a true guitar visionary, Jimi Hendrix. His music continues to inspire. What's your favourite Jimi Hendrix track or solo?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Icon
angles.copy: That iconic zebra crossing! Celebrating the anniversary of The Beatles' 'Abbey Road'. What's your favourite track from this legendary album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Power
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon and powerful voice. What's your favourite Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still a true rock 'n' roll star. What's your favourite Oasis or Liam solo track?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon released his timeless anthem 'Imagine' on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Imagine all the people... celebrating John Lennon's iconic 'Imagine', released on this day in 1975. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: 25 years since the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple released the first iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember the day your music collection fit in your pocket? It's 25 years since the first iPod dropped! What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the iconic 007 film franchise.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Time to decide: who's your favourite Bond, and what's the ultimate Bond theme song? Shaken, not stirred, of course.
